title: Scraped
body:
## About This pack retextures all copper blocks to be a bit more consistent between oxidation phases, with untarnished copper looking more like brushed copper. On top of this, a few of the variants are retextured to have a more industrial look.

Here is a build to demonstrate the theme(more in the gallery):![a hallway made of tuff blocks and the new retextured copper, with grating on the floor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa7b599664552530000577d3539ab04d44798cf5.png)![same hallway as the image above, showcasing an intersection with a smaller hallway](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afeb4993df7e06a90f855df907e83e5ef6fb9165.png)![same hallway as the other 2 pictures, this time showing the very end of it with a door](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b85646482132b4dc3b34a4bfed34899880bdf2b4.png)
